title: leontopodium nivale subsp. nivale
intro: Leontopodium nivale subsp. nivale, also known as Edelweiss, is a perennial alpine plant that belongs to the sunflower family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Edelweiss has been used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as digestive problems and skin irritations. The herbal preparations of Edelweiss include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
